🚀 My Journey

I'm a CSE student at Lovely Professional University, driven by curiosity about how data reveals hidden patterns. My path started with programming fundamentals and rapidly expanded into data science, machine learning, and analytical visualization.

🎯 My Approach

I tackle every data problem methodically — thorough exploratory data analysis, robust preprocessing pipelines, then applying the right models to communicate findings clearly. I completed hands-on ML & DS training at CipherSchools and deployed a real capstone project using Gradio for interactive model serving.

💡 What Drives Me

Whether analyzing 7,000+ commodity price records or predicting customer purchase likelihood with classification models, I love building solutions with real-world impact. My goal is to grow into a skilled data scientist who bridges raw data and strategic decision-making.

Featured Work

// project_01 · May–Jun 2025
Product Purchase Likelihood Prediction
  • Built a classification model in Python with data cleaning & preprocessing on 200+ customer records.
  • Identified critical features — time on website, age, previous purchases — via feature importance analysis.
  • Deployed using an interactive Gradio application for strategic, data-driven marketing insights.

// project_02 · Jan–May 2025
Commodity Price Trend Analysis & Market Visualization
  • Analyzed 7,000+ records across Indian markets — identifying regional price trends for Tomato & Turmeric.
  • Visualized key metrics: Min, Max, Modal Price by State and commodity using Python + Excel.
  • Delivered actionable insights for procurement and inventory management decisions.
